tools.name: model_finder
tools.description: Recommend premium urban electric bicycles (e-bikes). Use this tool to launch an interactive finder UI when a user is looking for an e-bike, electric bike, or commuting bicycle, or explicitly asks about Cowboy bikes.

tools.name: compare_cowboy_ebikes
tools.description: Compare specific Cowboy electric bicycle models to highlight differences in frame, terrain suitability, and price.

tools.name: track_ui_event
tools.description: Internal tool for telemetry. The AI must NOT call this tool proactively; it is only invoked by the UI.
